calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Property To Estate
Off Calendar Apr-16-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Robert Rippetoe (Petitioner).

The Court found good cause to grant the request to dispense with notice to John Wise and Darryl Wright, (signing the ex parte order for the same in open court). With regard to the Petition For Order Directing Transfer Of Property To Estate, the Court found that everything appeared to be in order and that the bank accounts in question were confirmed to the Decedent and the Estate. The Court granted the petition, (subject to a written order). Mr. Melbostad will submit the proposed order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
